recommended_next_actions: Restage the build-pack to the saved AlgoSec lab target before the next remote Codex run.
Run the generate-support-baseline command on the AlgoSec lab appliance and review the resulting JSON and HTML artifacts.
Use the first lab baseline review to decide which AlgoSec services deserve deeper playbooks next.

required_gates.summary: Build-pack contract validation passed after the first ADF slice landed.

Prove the smallest end-to-end ADF path on one controlled lab-style fixture: bounded evidence in, canonical baseline and playbook JSON out, and a minimal HTML support view rendered without broad test expansion.
